Recognition & Accreditation

Standards you can stand behind

A credential is only worth what it can be trusted to mean. This page sets out how ICI holds its standard, the bodies it works with, and the recognition behind its credentials, stated plainly and only where it is genuinely earned.

How we hold our standard

Every level is assessed on real coaching, not attendance
Faculty are practising coaches held to a professional code
Curriculum aligned to international coaching competency standards
Independent review of our assessment process
See the Mastery PathwayContact us

The International Coaching Institute trains and certifies coaches one-to-one, online, blending coaching craft with leadership, psychology, neuroscience and human behaviour. Become the coach people trust.
